special_mechanics.name: Jump Attack
special_mechanics.description: Young Simba primarily defeats enemies by jumping on them

special_mechanics.name: Roar Attack
special_mechanics.description: Simba's roar consumes a replenishable meter, can be used to stun enemies or solve puzzles

special_mechanics.name: Adult Combat
special_mechanics.description: Adult Simba gains access to various combat moves such as scratching, mauling, and throws

special_mechanics.name: Health Management
special_mechanics.description: Player can collect various types of bugs to restore health and extend health/roar meters

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Sources contain development background, level design notes, and gameplay mechanics description, but no precise physics parameters, ROM values, or quantitative movement data. Movement physics undocumented in available sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - The Lion King (SNES)
